channel.title: Shreyas Korad — Writing
channel.description: Articles and insights on learning design, gamification, and L&D strategy.

item.title: Why is EVERYONE Failing At Gamification? (WHAT’S REALLY GOING ON?)
item.description: Why is EVERYONE Failing At Gamification? (WHAT’S REALLY GOING ON?): Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.
